questions.question: Arrange these sentences: P:This is done by studying. Q:Success requires hard work. R:Hard work means dedication. S:Ultimately, you achieve your goal. Correct order:
Identify the correct sequence of jumbled sentences about health: A-Exercise B-Leads to C-Regular D-Good health →
questions.explanation: Regular Exercise Leads to Good health = C-A-B-D.

questions.question: Which is the best opening sentence for a paragraph about digital literacy?
options: Digital tools are difficult to use.
In today's world, digital literacy is essential.
questions.correctAnswer: In today's world, digital literacy is essential.
questions.explanation: The best opening introduces the topic broadly and engages the reader.

questions.question: Para jumble: 1-He decided to study. 2-He was failing his exams. 3-His grades improved. 4-He worked hard every day. Correct order:
Which transition word best connects 'She was tired. ___ she kept working.'?
questions.explanation: However shows contrast between being tired and continuing to work.

questions.question: Which sentence would best conclude a paragraph about climate change?
options: Immediate global action is crucial to prevent irreversible damage.
questions.correctAnswer: Immediate global action is crucial to prevent irreversible damage.
questions.explanation: The conclusion should summarize the urgency and main point of the paragraph.

questions.question: Arrange: A-Results were published B-Research was conducted C-A hypothesis was formed D-The experiment was designed → Order:
